hero_subtitle: A completely personalised menu built around your event, your guests and your vision.
samples_intro: A taste of what's possible. These are real menus we've cooked for real events — from family-style Mediterranean feasts and garden barbecues to winter warmers and afternoon tea. Each one is a starting point for the conversation, not a fixed offering. Tap any menu to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.

samples.title: Family Style Mediterranean Flavours
samples.blurb: A sunny late summer day; a perfect day for this village fete style reception. Guests whiled away the afternoon chatting on the lawn and playing garden games. Drinks stalls offering teas, bellinis & cordials were set up under the trees. A relaxed afternoon on the lawn was followed by the meal, in a marquee in front of the manor house.

items: Slow roasted rosemary-crusted shoulder of lamb with red onion & red wine gravy
Chicken Provencal: boneless breasts & thighs roasted with chunky garlic, capers, kalamata olives & mini plum tomatoes
Roasted new potatoes with rosemary & garlic
Mixed leaf and herb salad with pomegranate seeds and a pomegranate & honey dressing
Tomato, courgette and mint salad
Raspberry swirl New York style cheesecake with raspberry coulis
A stack of gooey chocolate brownies with fresh local raspberries

samples.title: Family Style Moroccan
samples.blurb: A rustic barn complex on top of a hill with panoramic views in all directions was the setting for this family oriented reception. Fizz & cordials were served to guests in the sunny courtyard. Colourful macarons were passed around and very quickly devoured!

items: Roasted pepper & white bean hummus with flatbread & lavash crisps
Middle-Eastern savoury & sweet spiced nuts
Moroccan chicken skewers
Spinach & feta filo pies
Tagine of chicken with preserved lemons & olives
Tagine of butternut squash, chick peas & spinach in a smoky tomato sauce
Jewelled couscous
Saffron rice with dried apricots, sultanas & toasted almonds
Mixed leaves with pomegranate seeds and a pomegranate & honey dressing
Smoky Moroccan carrot salad
Citrus & almond cake with Greek yogurt & honey
Flourless chocolate cake with raspberry coulis

samples.title: Colourful Summery Vegetarian
samples.blurb: A marquee attached to the host's family home, incorporating flower beds & vines. This meal was completely vegetarian, with the vegetables stepping up and taking centre stage. The focus was on freshness, quality, colour and of course flavour.

items: Salad of mixed leaves with goat cheese, toasted crumbled walnuts & pomegranate seeds with a pomegranate & honey dressing
Rainbow vegetable terrine with a tomato & roasted garlic sauce
Warm roasted root vegetables with a soy & maple glaze
French beans & mange tout with toasted hazelnuts & orange
Multicoloured tomato salad with chives, spring onions, extra virgin olive oil & Maldon salt
Natural Bread Company breads
Pavlovas with Chantilly cream, fresh strawberries & honey mango puree
Tarte au citron
Flourless chocolate & almond celebration cake

samples.title: Family Style Winter Warmer
samples.blurb: The weather outside was frightful, but the atmosphere inside the village hall was warm and comforting. Guests hurried in out of the wind and rain and were greeted with a warm glass of mulled cider. The meal was hearty warming winter dishes, designed to be mostly gluten & dairy free.

items: Green pea & mint soup served with local artisan breads & butter
Classic beef bourguignon
Butternut squash, butter bean & spinach tagine (V)
Root vegetable mash
Braised red cabbage with bramley apple & sultanas
Lemony chick pea, sweet pepper, feta & herb salad
Spinach, orange and toasted almond salad with a citrus vinaigrette
Citrus and almond cake with Greek yogurt & honey
Flourless chocolate cake with raspberry coulis
Pavlova with passionfruit cream
